subject: [PATCH v2 07/18] erofs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

reviews.author: Gao Xiang
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without any technical comments or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
On 2026/7/1 08:09, Joanne Koong wrote:
> Convert erofs iomap_ops to the new ->iomap_next() callback. This uses the
> iomap_process() helper, which finishes the previous mapping if needed
> and produces the next one. No functional changes are intended.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>

Reviewed-by: Gao Xiang <hsiangkao@linux.alibaba.com>

Thanks,
Gao Xiang

2026-07-01.patch_summary: The patch converts the iomap operations in erofs to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which simplifies the code and uses a helper function to process the mappings.
